name: PayPal Holdings, Inc.
summary: PayPal Holdings, Inc. is a global digital payments company offering a range of products and services including PayPal, PayPal Credit, PayPal Open, Braintree, Venmo, Xoom, Hyperwallet, Honey, and Paidy. The company enables individuals and businesses to send and receive payments, access credit, and manage financial transactions across multiple markets and jurisdictions worldwide.

products.name: PayPal
products.description: Core digital payments platform for sending and receiving money.

products.name: PayPal Credit
products.description: Credit product offered under the PayPal brand.

products.name: PayPal Open
products.description: Open payments platform product offered by PayPal.

products.name: Braintree
products.description: Payment processing platform for merchants and developers.

products.name: Xoom
products.description: International money transfer and remittance service.

products.name: Hyperwallet
products.description: Global payout platform for businesses and marketplaces.

products.name: Honey
products.description: Shopping and savings tool offering deals and rewards.

products.name: Paidy
products.description: Buy now, pay later payment service operating in select markets.
